docket_entries.description: NTC OF TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DENNIS, ELIZABETH
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-25-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE A DISMISSAL. THE MAY-16-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT DENNIS, ELIZABETH
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAR-17-2008 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON DEC-07-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT AND MARK GOOSSENS, ESQ., SPECIALLY APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF. REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR ON MAR-17-2008. PARTIES RETURNED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH JUDGE PRO TEM TO REPRESENT TO THE COURT THAT PLAINTIFF WILL BE DISMISSING THE CASE. ASSIGNED TO PRETRIAL DEPT. 212 ON MAY-16-2008 AT 10:30 AM FOR CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE FOR DISMISSAL. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
